title: limodorum tetragonum
intro: Limodorum tetragonum, also known as the square orchid or square-leaved orchid, is a species of orchid native to Europe and parts of Asia, characterized by its square-shaped leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, and it is believed to possess antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The medicinal properties of Limodorum tetragonum are thought to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and fighting infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves that can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
